title: T-017 — POST /api/scheduler/assignments/bulk_approve
prompt:
# T-017 — POST /api/scheduler/assignments/bulk_approve

PRD: 07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md §16.2 OQ-EXT-06, §17.1 PLE-004 FR-07-PLE-004-02
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement [Approve All] bulk endpoint approving all eligible assignments across all completed runs (per OQ-EXT-06) and emitting a single batched outbox event scheduler.assignments.bulk_approved with array payload.

## Implementation contract
1. Route `apps/web/src/app/api/scheduler/assignments/bulk_approve/route.ts`: POST body { user_id, filter? { run_id?: string, line_id?: string, shift_id?: string } }.
2. Single transaction: SELECT all draft assignments matching filter (default: all completed-run draft assignments for tenant), UPDATE in batch to status='approved', UPDATE matching work_orders rows in same tx, INSERT one outbox_events row with array payload.
3. RBAC: Planner Advanced (full set), Scheduling Officer (only own assigned scope per OQ-EXT-06).
4. Returns 200 with { approved_count, batched_event_id }.

## Files
- apps/web/src/app/api/scheduler/assignments/bulk_approve/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/lib/scheduler/bulk-approve-action.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/app/api/scheduler/assignments/bulk_approve/__tests__/route.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given 5 draft assignments across 2 completed runs + Planner Advanced role, when POST runs, then all 5 marked approved, all 5 work_orders updated, exactly ONE outbox_events row inserted with array payload of 5 ids
2. Given Scheduling Officer role, when POST runs, then only assignments where assignment.assigned_to=officer_id (or scope filter) are approved
3. Given role 'Operator', when POST runs, then 403 returned

## Test strategy
- RED: write __tests__/route.test.ts covering single batched outbox emit + scope-limited approve + 403
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test scheduler/assignments/bulk_approve'

## Risk red lines
- Do not emit one outbox event per assignment (must be single batched)
- Do not bypass Scheduling Officer scope guard (OQ-EXT-06)
- Do not skip transaction wrapping (partial failures must roll back)

pipeline_inputs.description: Bulk-approve assignments across all completed runs; single batched outbox event; Scheduling Officer scope-limited.
pipeline_inputs.details: Endpoint approves all matching draft assignments in one transaction and emits exactly one outbox_events row scheduler.assignments.bulk_approved with array payload. Scheduling Officer scope constraint enforced.
out_of_scope: Do not implement bulk reject (not in PRD)
Do not implement bulk override (not in PRD)
Do not stream progress (synchronous response acceptable for typical 5-50 batch)

Given Scheduling Officer role, when POST runs, then only assignments within officer's scope are approved
Given role 'Operator', when POST runs, then 403 returned
